Titulo: Aerolíneas Argentinas cancels interior World Cup flights on fuel costs and weak demand
Resumen: State carrier dropped Córdoba, Rosario, Tucumán-Miami World Cup flights citing fuel costs and lower-than-expected bookings

Titulo: MakeMyTrip bets on conversational AI as the next paradigm shift in travel commerce
Resumen: MakeMyTrip CEO says AI will bridge language and trust barriers for 200M+ underserved users. Voice-first AI to become default for non-metro bookings.
